MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEFFERNON, WANDA
ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WANDA HEFFERNON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT [CCP 664.6] IS DENIED. CCP 664.6 DOES NOT APPLY TO THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES SETTLED ORALLY BEFORE THE COURT OR EXECUTED A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SEE HARRIS V. RUDIN, RICHMAN & APPEL (1999) 74 CAL.APP.4TH 299, 305. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement [Ccp 664.6]
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Chris Feaser, Esq. of Philip Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendant and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling, which was not contested. PLAINTIFF WANDA HEFFERNON'S Motion To Enforce Terms Of Settlement [CCP 664.6] is denied. CCP 664.6 does not apply to this case. Plaintiff fails to show that the parties settled orally before the Court or executed a written settlement agreement. See Harris v. Rudin, Richman & Appel (1999) 74 Cal.App.4th 299, 305. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
